dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 312 EH: Dismissing the election contest relating to the office of Representative from the Fourteenth Congressional District of Florida.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Dismissing the election contest relating to the office of Representative from the Fourteenth Congressional District of Florida.

section.text: That the election contest filed on January 9, 2025, relating to the office of Representative from the Fourteenth Congressional District of Florida is dismissed on the grounds of untimely filing with the House of Representatives.
